title: Autumn Delight Pilaf
description: A hearty and flavorful pilaf dish made with roasted butternut squash, perfect for fall and winter seasons.

ingredients.name: Roasted Italian seasoning
ingredients.notes: dried herbs such as oregano, thyme, and rosemary

instructions: Toss cubed butternut squash with olive oil, salt, and black pepper in a bowl. Spread on a baking sheet and roast for 20-25 minutes, or until tender.
Cook pilaf according to package instructions. Set aside.
In a large skillet, combine roasted squash, cooked pilaf, and Italian seasoning. Stir to combine.
Cook over medium heat for 2-3 minutes, or until the pilaf is heated through and the squash is coated with the pilaf.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
